title: Survivalmon
description: Get the matching modpack to the Survivalmon server and catch 'em all!
body:
**This modpack is based on Fabric 0.15.11, created for (and including) Cobblemon 1.5, all rights & credits to the respective owners of the included mods.**

Explore the world of Survivalmon! This modpack aims to be an all-in-one solution for Cobblemon / Minecraft Pokémon Trainers. We have gathered some of the best mods to enhance your experience, and we also provide the matching server for multiplayer. Check the Survivalmon Discord to join!

**Contents of Survivalmon-1.20.1-V2.4.0**


**Mods**

- fabric-api-0.92.1+1.20.1 - **Fabric API**
- Cobblemon-fabric-1.5.2+1.20.1 - **Cobblemon**
- Cobbreeding-fabric-1.7.0 - **Adds Pokémon Breeding**
- cobblemounts-1.3.0 - **Makes Pokémon ridable**
- XaerosWorldMap_1.38.4_Fabric_1.20 - **Map Mod**
- Xaeros_Minimap_24.1.1_Fabric_1.20 - **MiniMap Mod**
- Cobblepedia-Fabric-0.6.1 (+ dependency Patchouli-1.20.1-84-FABRIC) - **Ingame Cobblemon Wiki**
- lootr-fabric-1.20-0.7.33.81 - **Personal Loot Chests**
- travelersbackpack-fabric-1.20.1-9.1.13 (+ dependency cardinal-components-api-5.2.2 + cloth-config-11.1.118-fabric) - **Travelers Backpack for storage and abilities**
- custom-crosshair-mod-v1.5.3-fabric-mc1.20.1 - **Custom Crosshair**
- MegamonsFabric-1.2.1 - **Mega Evolutions**
- cobblemon-spawn-notification-1.4-fabric-1.3.0 (+ dependency fabric-language-kotlin-1.11.0+kotlin.2.0.0) - **Shiny & Legendary Notifications**
- Jade-1.20-fabric-11.9.2 - **Adds info about things you're looking at (e.g. Cobblemon stats and dex entries)**
- cobblemonintegrations-1.20.1-1.0.5 - **Integrates Cobblemon info into Jade mod)
- wherearemytms-2.1.2-hotfix - **Move TMs (unlimited) and TRs (one-time use) can now be created with a TM-Machine**
- cobblemon-counter-1.5-fabric-1.0.0 - **Counts K.O.s and Cobblemon caught in order to allow for chain-bonuses**
- cobblemon-unchained-1.5-fabric-1.0.1 - **Enables the chain bonuses from Cobblemon counter**
- cobblemon-unimplementeditems-1.5-fabric-1.0.1 - **Adds new items and recipes such as bottlecaps and potions**
- GymBadges-1.0 - **Adds Gym Badges for Player Gyms**
- voicechat-fabric-1.20.1-2.5.15 - **Voicechat for Survivalmon Server**
- sound-physics-remastered-fabric-1.20.1-1.4.2 - **Realistic sound physics for voicechat**
- modmenu-7.2.2 - **Dependency for sound-physics-remastered**
- bobby-5.0.1 - **Allows the client to set view distance independent of server view distance** 
- sodium-fabric-0.5.8+mc1.20.1 - **GPU & CPU optimization for better performance**
- iris-1.7.0+mc1.20.1 - **Allows Shaderpacks to be used**
- pokeplushie-fabric-1.1.0-1.20.1 - **Added feature to create decoration plushie of catched Cobblemon**
- sit-1.20.1-27 - **Allows you to sit on stairs and slabs**
- trinkets-3.7.2 - **Adds Trinkets slots**
- elytraslot-fabric-6.3.0+1.20.1 - **Allows Elytra to be worn in the Trinkets Cape slot**
- polymorph-fabric-0.49.5+1.20.1 - **Allows to choose between crafting outcomes, if there are overlapping recipes**
- things-0.3.3+1.20 (+ dependency owo-lib-0.11.2+1.20) - **Adds Trinkets for the Trinkets mod**
- chat_heads-0.12.2-fabric-1.20 - **Makes you see who you're chatting with**
- sodium-extra-0.5.4+mc1.20.1-build.115 - **Performance boosting mod**
- reeses_sodium_options-1.7.2+mc1.20.1-build.101 - **Performance boosting mod**
- enhancedblockentities-0.9+1.20 - **Performance boosting mod**
- dynamic-fps-3.4.3+minecraft-1.20.0-fabric - **Performance boosting mod**
- entityculling-fabric-1.6.5-mc1.20.1 - **Performance boosting mod**
- ferritecore-6.0.1-fabric - **Performance boosting mod**
- ImmediatelyFast-Fabric-1.2.15+1.20.4 - **Performance boosting mod**
- lithium-fabric-mc1.20.1-0.11.2 - **Performance boosting mod**
- modernfix-fabric-5.17.0+mc1.20.1 - **Performance boosting mod**
- starlight-1.1.2+fabric.dbc156f - **Performance boosting mod**
- Impactor-Fabric-5.2.1+1.20.1 - **Dependency for server-side economy messages**
- Icarus-Fabric-2.9.0 (+ dependency midnightlib-fabric-1.4.1.1) - **Adds wings to craft with Elytra**
- BetterF3-7.0.2-Fabric-1.20.1 - **Improved display of F3 data**
- wraith-waystones-3.3.2+mc1.20.1 - **Adds craftable Waystones to teleport with**
- vmp-fabric-mc1.20.1-0.2.0+beta.7.102-all - **Improves client/server performance**
- Highlighter-1.20.1-fabric-1.1.9 (+ dependency Iceberg-1.20.1-fabric-1.1.18 + ForgeConfigAPIPort-v8.0.0-1.20.1-Fabric) - **Highlights new picked up items**
- betterdays-1.20.1-3.1.0.4-FABRIC - **Allows to set custom length of days and nights**
- toms_storage_fabric-1.20-1.6.6 - **Storage management system**
- stackrefill-1.20.1-4.4 (+ dependency collective-1.20.1-7.61) - **Automatically refills slot if item in inventory**
- charmofundying-fabric-6.5.0+1.20.1 - **Allows charms to be worn on a separate slot**
- artifacts-fabric-9.5.5 - **Additional items for trinkets slots**
- NaturesCompass-1.20.1-2.2.3-fabric - **Craftable compass that makes location of biomes possible**
- mythicmetals-0.19.7+1.20.1 - **Adds a large variety of ores, toolsets, weapons and armor**
- alloy-forgery-2.1.2+1.20 - **Allows you to forge alloys (combine metals)**
- FarmersDelight-1.20.1-2.1.1+refabricated - **Adds new vanilla like crops and meals to MC**
- RoughlyEnoughItems-12.1.725-fabric - **Recipe lookup tool, replacing JEI**
- wraith-harvestscythes-2.5.6+mc1.20 - **Adds harvesting scythes and machetes**
- ToolStats-Fabric-1.20.1-16.0.8 (+ dependency Bookshelf-Fabric-1.20.1-20.1.10) - **Shows more information about a tool**
- better-nether-9.0.10 - **New Nether Biomes + Blocks + Items**
- better-end-4.0.11 - **New Nether Biomes + Blocks + Items**
- bclib-3.0.14 - **Dependency for betternether + betterend**
- mythicmetals-decorations-0.6.0+1.20 - **Adds various metal-themed decorations for Mythic Metals**
- beautify-1.1.0+fabric-1.20 - **Adds lots of vanilla-styled ways to spice up your builds**
- another_furniture-fabric-1.20.1-3.0.1 - **Vanilla-styled Minecraft furniture mod**
- handcrafted-fabric-1.20.1-3.0.6 (+ dependency resourcefullib-fabric-1.20.1-2.1.25) - **Vanilla-styled Minecraft furniture mod**
- BotanyPots-Fabric-1.20.1-13.0.33 - **Adds pots that you can use to grow crops**
- BotanyPotsTiers-Fabric-1.20.1-6.0.1 - **Adds better Botany Pots from Botany Pots**
- highlight-fabric-1.20-2.0.1 - **Changes the visualization of specific blocks to have more aligned selections to their models**
- lazydfu-0.1.3 - **Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization**
- LongerChatHistory-1.4-Fabric - **Makes the chat history longer**
- moreculling-1.20.4-0.24.0 - **Changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance**
- BetterThirdPerson-Fabric-1.20-1.9.0 - **Improves third person camera view**
- notenoughanimations-fabric-1.7.1-mc1.20.1 - **Bringing first-person animations to the third-person**
- BetterPingDisplay-Fabric-1.20.1-1.1.1 - **Shows the ping in a numeric value**
- DripSounds-1.19.4-0.3.2 - **Adds sounds to dripping objects**
- EnchantmentDescriptions-Fabric-1.20.1-17.0.15 - **Adds descriptions to enchantments**
- indium-1.0.30+mc1.20.4 - **Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo**
- appleskin-fabric-mc1.20.1-2.5.1 - **Food/hunger-related HUD improvements**
- MouseTweaks-fabric-mc1.20-2.26 - **Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons**
- EasyMagic-v8.0.1-1.20.1-Fabric (+ dependency PuzzlesLib-v8.1.20-1.20.1-Fabric) - **Items stay after closing, and easy re-rolls.**
- EasyAnvils-v8.0.2-1.20.1-Fabric (+ dependency PuzzlesLib-v8.1.20-1.20.1-Fabric) - **Items stay, better name tags, many tweaks!**
- Cobblenav-1.2.5 - **Cobblenav adds a Cobblemon Pokénav item - check spawns without the command and save statistics of your PvP fights**
- Cobblenav Counter Integration-1.1.2 - **Integration of Cobblemon Counter mod into Cobblenav**
- Impactor-Fabric-5.2.2+1.20.1 - **Update from version 5.2.1**
- kubejs-fabric-2001.6.5-build.7 (+ dependency rhino-fabric-2001.2.2-build.18) - **Used for scripting FTB Quests**
- cobblemon_quests-[1.20.1]-fabric-1.1.9 - **Adds Cobblemon support to FTB Quests Mod**
- lootballs-1.1.3 - **Adds new Loot Balls to be found in the world**
- ReFramed-1.5.9 - **Additional blocks / variations for buildings**
- CosmeticArmor-1.20-1.6.0 - **Second slot for cosmetic armor**
- symbol-chat-1.20.1-1.1.2 - **Many chat symbols & smileys**
- talkbubbles-1.0.8 - **Talk bubbles above player & NPC heads**
- grapplemod-1.99.0+1.20.1.beta.fabric - **Adds Grapple Hooks**
- shulkercharm-1.2.2 - **Adds a Shulker Charm which enables limited creative flight**
- scholar-1.20.1-1.0.0-fabric - **Two-page book editing/viewing, colored books**
- (Fabric)Chiseled-Bookshelf-Visualizer-1.20-2.0 - **Visually displays the contents of the chiseled Bookshelves**


**Shader Packs**

- ComplementaryReimagined_r5.1.1 - **Lightweight Shaderpack for Iris**


**Resource Packs (downloaded upon server join)**

- Maxi's-JM+CM_PixelSShinies - **Cobblemon Icons for Journeymap**
- MysticMons_v1.9 - **Additional Cobblemon**
- cobble_cats - **Additional Cobblemon**
- PigeonPack - **Additional Cobblemon**
- LostMons [Cobblemon] v0.4.4 - **Additional Cobblemon**
- MissingMon_v2.6.1 [The Final Mask] [1.5 Update Compatible] - **Additional Cobblemon**
- Kale's Collection [v1.4] - **Additional Cobblemon**
- Dracomon_0.6.5 - **Additional Cobblemon**
- LackingMons-ReleaseCanditate-1 - **Additional Cobblemon**
- MoreMons - v0.5.3 - **Additional Cobblemon**
- GenoMons [1.5] - **Additional Cobblemon**
- Cobble-Remodels_v5.1 - **Improved existing Cobblemon**
- WurmplePackReleaseVerison1.1 - **Additional Cobblemon**
- NotSoCobblemon - **Additional Cobblemon**
- PocketMoensters_V4.0 - **Updated PocketMoensters_V3.0, adding Latias & Latios - credits to SK4N**

**Resource Packs (included in pack)**

- Cobblemon Interface v1.0.0 - **Cobblemon styled UI with mod integration, now optional**
- Faithful 32x - 1.20.1 - **Added recommended vanilla-style texture pack, is optional**


(for more details, go to "versions" and visit the original modpages)


**Installation**

The Modrinth app will take care of that for you. Please make sure to activate the resource packs once ingame.
